offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 clients, manual tracking of subscriptions causes missed renewals. We automate alerts for upcoming renewals instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking multiple subscription renewals and cancellations for clients.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and resources
try_it: Let users try tracking dashboard and email alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
